ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: All providers use OpenAI-compatible API format
ast.target: 所有提供商均使用 OpenAI 兼容的 API 格式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for chat and as the embedding fallback. Ollama: localhost:11434 | LM Studio: localhost:1234 | vLLM: localhost:8000
ast.target: 用于聊天和作为嵌入回退。Ollama: localhost:11434 | LM Studio: localhost:1234 | vLLM: localhost:8000

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Required for OpenAI. Embeddings inherit this unless an embedding API key is set. For local servers, use 'not-needed'
ast.target: OpenAI 必需。除非设置了嵌入 API 密钥，否则嵌入将继承此密钥。对于本地服务器，请使用 'not-needed'

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Leave blank to use the chat/default server. Use this for a separate OpenAI-compatible embedding server.
ast.target: 可选。留空则使用聊天/默认服务器。用于单独的 OpenAI 兼容嵌入服务器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Leave blank to inherit the chat/default API key. Use 'not-needed' to send no Authorization header.
ast.target: 可选。留空则继承聊天/默认 API 密钥。使用 'not-needed' 则不发送 Authorization 头。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Model for chat and text processing — type a name or browse from server
ast.target: 用于聊天和文本处理的模型——输入名称或从服务器浏览

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Model for RAG indexing — type a name or browse from server
ast.target: 用于 RAG 索引的模型——输入名称或从服务器浏览

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 用于响应的 AI 个性

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Edit the system prompt for this persona
ast.target: 编辑此角色的系统提示

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of previous messages to include (0-3)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow chat to propose note writes for manual approval. No note is changed until you approve the action card.
ast.target: 允许聊天建议笔记写入以供手动批准。在您批准操作卡之前，不会更改任何笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show raw <vault-actions> JSON in chat responses for troubleshooting.
ast.target: 在聊天响应中显示原始 <vault-actions> JSON 以进行故障排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Request streamed responses from the server. Obsidian buffers the final result before inserting it.
ast.target: 从服务器请求流式响应。Obsidian 会在插入前缓冲最终结果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wrap response in custom text (e.g., code blocks)
ast.target: 用自定义文本包装响应（例如，代码块）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Strip <think>, <reasoning>, <thought> blocks from output (useful for Qwen, DeepSeek)
ast.target: 从输出中剥离 、<reasoning>、<thought> 块（适用于 Qwen、DeepSeek）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: JSON array of marker pairs to strip from responses
ast.target: 用于从响应中剥离的标记对 JSON 数组

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used by 'Text: Run custom prompt' command
ast.target: 用于 'Text: Run custom prompt' 命令

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of relevant note chunks to send to the AI
ast.target: 发送给 AI 的相关笔记块数量

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically re-index notes every N minutes using your configured embedding server. Set to 0 to disable.
ast.target: 使用您配置的嵌入服务器，每 N 分钟自动重新索引笔记。设置为 0 可禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a notification when auto indexing

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Build searchable index of all notes in vault
ast.target: 为保险库中的所有笔记构建可搜索索引

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of files in current index
ast.target: 当前索引中的文件数量

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Required for SearXNG search. The instance must have JSON output enabled under search.formats.
ast.target: SearXNG 搜索所需。该实例必须在 search.formats 下启用 JSON 输出。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which search API to use for web and news search
ast.target: 选择用于网页和新闻搜索的搜索 API

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only used when the default source scope is Tag
ast.target: 仅在默认来源范围为标签时使用

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder used for the new weekly review note
ast.target: 用于存放新每周回顾笔记的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use YYYY-MM-DD for the local date
ast.target: 使用 YYYY-MM-DD 格式表示本地日期

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default note to append workflow output into
ast.target: 用于追加工作流输出的默认笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 聊天/默认 API 密钥

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 显示保险库操作调试 JSON

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Ask about your notes... Use @[[Note Name]], @folder(path), or #tag
ast.target: 询问关于您笔记的问题... 使用 @[[笔记名称]]、@folder(路径) 或 #标签

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Create action items from the following:
ast.target: 从以下内容创建行动项：

ast.target: 请先选择至少一个相关笔记。

ast.source: Related Notes opened in the right sidebar.
ast.target: 相关笔记已在右侧边栏中打开。

ast.target: LLM助手：正在自动索引笔记...

ast.target: 索引笔记失败。请检查控制台获取详细信息。

ast.target: 生成反向链接失败。请检查控制台获取详细信息。

ast.target: 获取存储统计信息时出错。请检查控制台获取详细信息。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: 📝 No previous embeddings found - ready to index notes

ast.target: 正在生成响应。这需要几秒钟...

ast.target: 身份验证失败（401）。请在插件设置中检查您的API密钥。

ast.source: Please set your Brave Search API key in settings

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 请在设置中设置您的SearXNG实例URL

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are a helpful assistant that generates relevant hashtags.
ast.target: 你是一个能生成相关主题标签的有用助手。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are a helpful writing assistant. Provide clear, concise responses. When editing text, preserve the author's voice unless asked to change it.
ast.target: 你是一个有用的写作助手。请提供清晰、简洁的回应。在编辑文本时，除非被要求更改，否则请保留作者的风格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a review note from the selected note scope.
ast.target: 从选定的笔记范围创建审阅笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turn meeting notes into a task update that can be appended to a project note.
ast.target: 将会议记录转化为可附加到项目笔记的任务更新。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Summarize progress, risks, and next steps for a project note.
ast.target: 总结项目笔记的进展、风险和后续步骤。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Vault Actions are disabled in settings.
ast.target: 保险库操作已在设置中禁用。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Create note action is missing a valid path or title.
ast.target: 创建笔记操作缺少有效的路径或标题。

ast.name: error
ast.source: No active editor selection was captured for this request.
ast.target: 此请求未捕获到活动的编辑器选择。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Action must be a JSON object.

ast.name: error
ast.source: Create note action is missing content.
ast.target: 创建笔记操作缺少内容。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Create note action is missing a path or title.
ast.target: 创建笔记操作缺少路径或标题。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Append action is missing a note target.
ast.target: 追加操作缺少目标笔记。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Replace selection action is missing replacement content.
ast.target: 替换选择操作缺少替换内容。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Vault Actions are disabled in settings.
ast.target: 保险库操作已在设置中禁用。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Action payload is missing or invalid.

ast.name: message
ast.source: Create note action is missing a valid destination.
ast.target: 创建笔记操作缺少有效的目标位置。

ast.name: message
ast.source: The approved target note is no longer available. Re-run the request.
ast.target: 已批准的目标笔记不再可用。请重新运行请求。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No editable markdown selection is active.
ast.target: 没有活动的可编辑Markdown选择。

ast.name: message
ast.source: The active note changed before approval. Re-run the request from the target note.
ast.target: 活动笔记在批准前已更改。请从目标笔记重新运行请求。

ast.name: message
ast.source: The selected text changed before approval. Re-run the request with the current selection.
ast.target: 选定的文本在批准前已更改。请使用当前选择重新运行请求。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 文本：运行自定义提示词

ast.name: name
ast.target: 文本：运行已保存的提示词...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: e.g., Translate to Spanish, Add emoji, Convert to haiku...
ast.target: 例如，翻译成西班牙语、添加表情符号、转换为俳句...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: JSON array of {start, end} marker pairs
ast.target: 包含 {start, end} 标记对的 JSON 数组

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 提示词标题（例如，翻译成西班牙语）

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Prompt text (e.g., Translate the following text to Spanish:)
ast.target: 提示词文本（例如，将以下文本翻译成西班牙语：）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Ask questions about your notes. You can search the whole vault, the current note, a folder, or tagged notes.
ast.target: 就您的笔记提问。您可以搜索整个保险库、当前笔记、某个文件夹或带标签的笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: LLM Helper can make mistakes. Verify important output.
ast.target: LLM 助手可能会犯错。请验证重要输出。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose a preset or write your own instruction:
ast.target: 选择一个预设或编写您自己的指令：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Draft a review workflow, then approve each note write manually.
ast.target: 起草一个审查工作流，然后手动批准每个笔记写入操作。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose a review workflow, confirm the note scope, and draft one or more approval-ready note changes.
ast.target: 选择一个审查工作流，确认笔记范围，并起草一个或多个待批准的笔记更改。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Manual workflow recipes draft note changes from RAG context and still require approval before writing.
ast.target: 手动工作流配方会根据 RAG 上下文起草笔记更改，并且在写入前仍需批准。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No saved prompts yet. Add one below.
ast.target: 尚无已保存的提示词。请在下方添加一个。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 与您的本地 LLM 聊天
